sourceList.title: Legacy NFS Source: Richard Floyer - birth: about 1174;

km.Floyer Hayes, Exeter, Devonshire, Englan: អេចetរ, ដិវ៉ុន, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer是Nicholas Floyer的兒子，於1166年出生在英國戴文艾可謝特。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1197年在他的家鄉享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer是Nicholas Floyer的儿子，于1166年出生在英国戴文艾可謝特。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1197年在他的家乡享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Floyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Flohr
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Chaim, Mort, Aron, Aviva, Avrohom, Chaya, Eliyahu, Emanuel, Shimon, Sholom, Yehuda, Yosef.
German: from a short form of the medieval Latin personal name Florentius (see Florence ) or of Florian .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Flor ‘array of flowers’ or metonymic occupational name from German Flor ‘gauze’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer was born in 1166, in Exeter, Devon, England as the son of Nicholas Floyer. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1197, in his hometown, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer est né en 1166, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, fils de Nicholas Floyer. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1197, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer wurde 1166 in Exeter, Devon, England, als Sohn von Nicholas Floyer geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1197 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer è nato il nel 1166 nel Exeter, Devon, England come figlio di Nicholas Floyer. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1197, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.Floyer Hayes, Exeter, Devonshire, Englan: イギリスデボンエクセター
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Floyerは1166年にイギリスデボンエクセターでNicholas Floyerの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1197年に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer(은)는 1166년 영국 데폰 세터에서 Nicholas Floyer의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1197년 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer nasceu em 1166, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra filho de Nicholas Floyer. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1197, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer родился в 1166 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия. Его отца звали Nicholas Floyer. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1197 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Floyer nació en 1166, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra como hijo de Nicholas Floyer. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1197, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años.

th.Floyer Hayes, Exeter, Devonshire, Englan: เอกเซตร์ร์, ดีฟอน, เอิงแลนด์
